medical_history.history_of_present_illness: ___ year old male with h/o GI bleed, h/o duodenal ulcer, CAD and ischemic CMY, atrial fibrillation on coumadin presents with fatigue and R hip pain x ___ weeks. His HCT was checked and it was 22.3. His grand-daughter was then asked to bring him to the ED. In the ED his HCT was 23.4. INR = 2.9. GI contacted and said no need to reverse HCT. Just monitor for now. No colonoscopy prep. Pt had a largely normal EGD and ___ in ___. Per ED he had a fall a few days ago but per patient and dtr, his last fall was 6 months ago. He has chronic R hip pain.
